arts.ttl: Bayern Munich boasts €765M revenue in 2024, per report
arts.sum: Deloitte’s Football Money League has the Bavarians fifth in club revenue last year, behind Manchester United. Bayern Munich remains one of world football’s premier brands, per the latest Deloitte’s Football Money League report.

arts.ttl: Future Bayern Munich player Tom Bischof lights up the Europa League in MOTM display
arts.sum: There has been plenty of recent consternation over Bayern Munich ’s treatment of young players and the club’s struggle to guide them through their development, with this worry extending to Tom Bischof, the teenager who will arrive in the summer on a free transfer from TSG Hoffenheim. Is he going to be given a chance or just binned off because the older guys in the team soak up all the playing time?

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s board has approved Alphonso Davies’ €120 million extension package
arts.sum: Bayern Munich is trying to balance their books by reducing wages or selling players outright. With Alphonso Davies, Joshua Kimmich, and Jamal Musiala all set to receive bumps in pay, here’s what the club’s situation looks like now:

arts.ttl: Sources: Mathys Tel rejects chance to join Spurs
arts.sum: Tel has informed Bayern of his intention to explore new opportunities in the January transfer window and sources told ESPN that Spurs had a €60 million ($62.5m) offer for the player accepted by the Bundesliga giants on Thursday. Tottenham Hotspur's hopes of bolstering their injury-depleted squad were dented on Friday after Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel rejected the opportunity to join Ange Postecoglou's side, sources have told ESPN.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich’s poor planning could lead to sale of Taichi Fukui to accommodate Adam Aznou loan
arts.sum: Even Adam Aznou, the talented left-back who has already made his debut for the Moroccan first team, seems set to go out on loan, via @iMiaSanMia_GER : Sure, Fukui turns 21 in the summer, he is too good for the U-23s and still too far away from the level of the Bayern first team for him to remain at the club long term.

arts.ttl: Update: Given the choice of playing this season at Tottenham Hotspur or sitting at Bayern Munich, Mathys Tel chose the bench
arts.sum: Bayern Munich wanted to send youngster Mathys Tel to Tottenham Hotspur on a lucrative loan-with-an-obligation-to-buy deal, but the attacker rejected it. For the first time in the past four days, Mathys #Tel is no longer ruling out staying at FC Bayern after rejecting Tottenham today!

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Mathys Tel rejects lucrative move to Tottenham
arts.sum: Multiple sources are currently reporting that Mathys Tel has rejected an offer to move to north London.

arts.ttl: Tottenham make enquiry for Man United's Alejandro Garnacho after they were REJECTED by Bayern Munich winger Mathys Tel
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Tottenham have made an enquiry for Manchester United's Alejandro Garnacho after missing out on Mathys Tel from Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel informed Tottenham of his intention to remain at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Bayern Munich centre-forward Mathys Tel (19) has informed Tottenham Hotspur of his intention to remain with the Bundesliga giants, according to The Athletic’s David Ornstein. The North London-based club previously…

arts.ttl: Manuel Neuer hints at Bayern Munich contract extension happening soon
arts.sum: From what the club’s front office has been saying about the trio of deals, it looks like all three will get done and announced in a matter of time, but the clock has been ticking as all three players have current contracts set to expire this summer. Straight from the horse’s mouth, it is becoming more clear that Neuer will coon put pen to paper on one-year contract extension at Bayern, it is just a matter of time before the club announces such.
